# Jiayi.co - AI and Immigration Platform Overview
# Last updated: 2026-03-31

## What is Jiayi
Jiayi.co is a bilingual (Chinese + English) platform focused on Canada immigration planning and consultant workflow support.

- Public users can explore immigration pathways and use AI-guided assessment tools.
- Licensed consultants (RCIC) can use workflow and case support features.
- Core public tool: Risk Compass.

Website: https://www.jiayi.co/

## Key Public Pages
- Home: https://www.jiayi.co/
- Risk Compass: https://www.jiayi.co/risk-compass
- Services: https://www.jiayi.co/services
- About: https://www.jiayi.co/about
- Blog index: https://www.jiayi.co/blog
- AI policy: https://www.jiayi.co/ai-policy

## AI Agent Resources
- AI agent profile: https://www.jiayi.co/.well-known/ai-agent.json
- RAG source: https://www.jiayi.co/rag-sources/jiayi-overview.txt
- Chinese LLM profile: https://www.jiayi.co/llms-zh.txt
- Full profile: https://www.jiayi.co/llms-full.txt

## Audience
- Chinese-speaking applicants planning study permit, work permit, and permanent residence.
- International users comparing Canadian immigration paths.
- Licensed consultants looking for structured intake and risk communication support.

## Notes
- Jiayi is a software platform and does not replace regulated legal advice.
- Immigration service decisions should be reviewed by licensed professionals.
